summary: Retest of smart-fallback PROF_MODIFIERS fix on /professions.html. All 4 targeted cases + 2 regression cases PASS. Technical labor modifiers (عزل, حراري, صوتي, ...) are now accepted by smart-fallback and generate the labor sheet with verification note. Anti-abuse rejection still functional. Specialist regression still functional. Main-search AI card still rendered.

smart_fallback_reject_عامل_بطيخ.error_message: إدخال غير صالح ... النص المُدخل لا يُمثّل مسمى مهنة معتمد

smart_fallback_reject_مهندس_علي.error_message: يرجى كتابة مسمى مهني صحيح ... يبدو أن المُدخل يحتوي على كلمة غير متعلّقة بالمهنة

main_search_regression_عامل_عزل_حراري.note: Card renders in collapsed state on results grid; full 7-item + amber note expansion in modal was previously verified in iteration_4 and not re-expanded here.

critical_code_review_comments: smart-fallback error <div id='smart-fallback-error'> keeps stale innerText after being hidden — visibility is controlled via display/hidden which is correct, but consider clearing innerText on hide to avoid confusion during debugging.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PROF_MODIFIERS fix in /app/frontend/public/smart-fallback.js verified. All 4 target cases + 2 regressions pass. No open bugs from previous iterations remaining. Preview URL: https://repo-manager-13.preview.emergentagent.com — remember to cache-bust with ?v=NN due to service worker.
